completed_tasks.name: research phase domain (970 lines, 5 findings + 5 OQ)
plan phase 2 — three plans, plan-checker converged in 2 iterations (12→0 issues)
extract phase 1 learnings (12 decisions / 10 lessons / 11 patterns / 8 surprises)

remaining_tasks.name: Wave 1: package scaffold + audit log + channels + audit/channel CLIs + AT-A1/A4/A5 fixtures
Wave 2 (depends on 02-01): classifier + classify CLI + AT-A3 fixture (in valid/)
Wave 3 (depends on 02-01, 02-02): thermocline-py ResultPolicy patch + shadow + policy + policy preview CLI + AT-A2 fixture

decisions.decision: D-01..D-03 audit log: denormalized SQLite table (entries) with JSON payload column + indexed metadata; typed query() over raw _query_rows() with round-trip property test; chain hash = whole-entry canonical-JSON via thermocline.canonicalize, algo_version='blake3-v1' encodes both function + domain
decisions.rationale: Single-table walk for AUDIT-08 chain integrity is simplest verifier loop; export to JSON Lines almost free; cross-impl ports already have JCS via thermocline-py; future archival/redaction needs can be addressed via blake3-v2 per AUDIT-02 dispatch from day 1

decisions.decision: D-04..D-07 channels: three-store model (keystore = source-of-truth + channels.db SQLite metadata index + audit.db SQLite audit log); keystore-as-truth drift recovery on startup; namespace 'photophore.channel' service with channel_id usernames + '_index' sentinel (resolves OQ-1 — python-keyring has no enumerate-by-service API); three-step write ordering keystore.set → audit.append → channels.db.upsert
decisions.rationale: Trust store separation from audit log (CHAN-04) honored to the letter; AT-A1/AT-A5 framing cleanest under split; single audit entry per channel op

decisions.decision: D-08..D-10 path-rules config: YAML at ~/.config/photophore/rules.yaml with --rules CLI override; load-per-invocation (no daemon); loader-time hard refusal of missing '**' catch-all; ordered list of {pattern, tier, reason} with first-match-wins; pathspec>=1.1.1 for glob (RESEARCH §6 — fnmatch/pathlib fail on **/.env*)
decisions.rationale: YAML aligns with Phase 1 D-04 conformance manifest format; XDG-default location matches sovereign-node mental model; loader-time refusal is the only acceptable enforcement for CLASS-03 since runtime fallthrough silently classifies unmatched content as something other than local (privacy primitive)

decisions.decision: D-11 sync Phase 2 + thin async shim in Phase 3: zero async def, zero aiosqlite, zero pytest-asyncio in Phase 2; Phase 3 ships photophore.dispatch.aio (~20 LOC) wrapping audit.append/query and channels.transition_to with asyncio.to_thread
decisions.rationale: Sync core keeps domain logic readable, testable, dependency-light; pure-CPU functions (classifier, shadow) shouldn't be async def; Phase 3 dispatch is the only async surface and owns its own boundary code

decisions.decision: D-12..D-14 CLI: single 'photophore' binary + click command groups; --json flag with audit-jsonl twist (audit query/export emit JSON Lines, others single JSON document); structured exit codes (0/1/2/3/4/5; 6 reserved for Phase 3 dispatch)
decisions.rationale: Predictable exit codes make CI integration trivial; per-subcommand JSON-vs-JSONL distinction is by nature; click groups allow consistent --help across all subcommands

decisions.decision: OQ-2 thermocline-py spec patch: rename _ResultPolicy → public ResultPolicy in thermocline.envelope, add to __all__, retain backward-compat alias; record in thermocline/CHANGELOG.md v0.3.1 as Phase 2 carry-over patch (analogous to Phase 1's THERMO-01 cirdan→thermocline rename)
decisions.rationale: Plan 02-03 needs ResultPolicy as a first-class import for policy.author() and CLI; private-path import binds Phase 2 to a private API; one-line public-export patch is the clean solution

decisions.decision: OQ-3 ShadowResult shape: @dataclass(frozen=True) class ShadowResult with shadow: Shadow + warnings: tuple[str, ...] fields; hard-fail (irreversibility test) raises ShadowQualityError(IRREVERSIBILITY_FAILED), soft-fail returns ShadowResult with warnings populated
decisions.rationale: Distinguishes hard-fail (must abort) from soft-warn (continues with audit warning) at the type level; immutable per Phase 1 frozen-dataclass + redacted-repr discipline

decisions.decision: OQ-4 AT-A1 channel-impersonation fixture is structural-only in Phase 2 (phase: 3 in MANIFEST.yaml); behavioral wire deferred to Phase 3 dispatch coordinator. AT-A2 (shadow correlation) wired behaviorally in 02-03 via Hypothesis shadow_id uniqueness test (also asserts no caching). AT-A3 fixture moved to conformance/valid/ (it documents intended priority-order behavior, not an attack to reject); behavioral test in test_classifier_priority.py fires the priority order. AT-A4 (audit log tampering) wired behaviorally via 02-01 chain integrity Hypothesis test. AT-A5 (trust-store co-location) wired structurally via test_channels_separation.py asserting audit.db ≠ channels.db files. AT-A6 deferred to Phase 4 CONF-02.
decisions.rationale: Phase 2 ships everything that's behaviorally testable without dispatch; Phase 3 wires the remainder; Phase 4 closes the AT-* coverage CI gate

decisions.decision: Plan-checker iteration 1 closed 6 BLOCKER + 6 WARNING; iteration 2 confirmed all 12 issues closed with 0 new issues. Major fixes: B1 (synthetic dispatch payload audit test for AUDIT-04 storage-layer coverage), B2 (POLICY-03 must_haves explicitly marked '(Phase 2 partial)' with Phase 3 wiring note), B3 (Hypothesis shadow uniqueness test made explicit with inner range(100) loop = 10,000 total calls), B4 (test_channels_separation.py moved from Task 2 to Task 4 alongside AT-A5 fixture), B5 (pip install -e prefix on every verify command for executor session safety), B6 (audit export emits human-readable table without --json, JSON Lines with --json — D-12 compliance), W7 (PathRules redefined as typing.Protocol to avoid type:ignore — Phase 1 LEARNINGS lesson), W8 (chain integrity test also tampers prev_hash directly), W11 (build_schemas --write && --check after _ResultPolicy rename for Pydantic  key change), W12 (AT-A3 fixture moved from invalid/ to valid/ with documentation framing)
decisions.rationale: Plan-checker convergence pattern from Phase 1 (Plan 01-04 took 3 iterations 11→3→0); Phase 2 converged in 2 iterations 12→0 — front-load planning, execute fast

next_action: Run /gsd-execute-phase 2 to begin Wave 1 (Plan 02-01: package scaffold + audit log + channels + their CLIs). Recommended modifiers: --auto for autonomous wave-by-wave execution, --no-transition if you want to stop after Phase 2 completes (don't auto-chain into Phase 3). Phase 1 pattern: /gsd-execute-phase 2 --auto --no-transition.
context_notes: Phase 2 fully planned. Three plans land in dependency order: 02-01 (Wave 1, autonomous, audit + channels + CLIs) → 02-02 (Wave 2, depends on 02-01, classifier + classify CLI) → 02-03 (Wave 3, depends on 02-01, 02-02, shadow + policy + policy preview CLI + thermocline-py ResultPolicy public-export patch). Total 12 tasks across 3 plans (4 each). All 33 Phase 2 requirement IDs covered (CHAN/AUDIT/CLASS/SHADOW/POLICY/CLI). All 14 D-XX context decisions honored. All 5 OQ resolutions implemented. AT-A1/A2/A3/A4/A5 fixtures land in Phase 2; AT-A6 deferred to Phase 4 CONF-02. Plan-checker converged in 2 iterations. Working tree clean; nothing in flight. Phase 1 LEARNINGS.md committed alongside plans for cross-phase context inheritance. Phase 1 patterns the Phase 2 executor must reuse: real-fixture-from-disk regression discipline (BL-04 lesson), isinstance keystore probe (BL-03), explicit str() casts over type:ignore (mypy --strict lesson), single canonical-JSON path (THERMO-04), Sensitive[T] redacted __repr__ for any field carrying content bytes (D-03 carry-forward), TDD discipline (RED commits before GREEN). Plan 02-03 Task 1 lands a thermocline-py spec patch (ResultPolicy public export) — this is a cross-suite spec patch in the THERMO-01 carry-over pattern; thermocline tests must still pass after the patch.
